About Laptops Special

Free Tools for Keyboard & Mouse Testing

We build fast, accurate, browser-based diagnostic tools for gamers, developers, and everyday tech users — completely free, no downloads, no signups.

Who We Are

Laptops Special is a free online tools platform focused on PC peripheral diagnostics. We started with a simple mission: give everyone access to accurate hardware testing tools without needing to install software or create accounts.

Our tools are used by casual users who want to check if their keyboard is working correctly, competitive gamers benchmarking their equipment, and tech enthusiasts who just love knowing their numbers.

Our Values

🆓
Always Free
Every tool on this site is free to use, forever. No paywalls, no premium plans.
⚡
Fast & Accurate
We use real-time browser APIs to give you precise measurements, not estimates.
🔒
Privacy First
No data leaves your device. All testing happens locally in your browser.
📱
No Install Needed
Open any tool in your browser and start immediately. Works on all modern browsers.

Our Tools

⌨️
Keyboard Tester
Test key response time, scan rate, polling rate, and identify stuck or broken keys.
🖱
Mouse Rate Test
Check mouse polling rate, click latency, movement speed, and generate heatmaps.

Have a suggestion or found a bug?

We'd love to hear from you. Reach out through our contact page.
